title: Austria won't call up replacement to World Cup squad despite Christoph Baumgartner injury | Flashscore.com
original_text:
Austria head coach вҒ Ralf Rangnick has decided not to call вҖҢup a replacement to вҖҢhis World Cup вҖҢsquad following the loss вҖҢof midfielder Christoph Baumgartner вҖҢto injury, the Austrian Football Association (OFB) вҖҢsaid on Wednesday.

Baumgartner was вҒ ruled вҖҢout of the tournament вҖӢafter sustaining a thigh injury before вҖӢ Monday's 1-0 friendly win over Tunisia .

The loss вҒ of вҖӢthe 26-year-old RB Leipzig player is seen as a major blow вҖҢfor Austria .

"This is of course very bitter news for Christoph and for us as a team," Rangnick said.

The squad departs for the United States вҖҢon Thursday ahead вҖӢof their opening Group вҖҢJ match against Jordan on June 16th, before facing Argentina and Algeria .
